positive: A minimalist, abstract nature scene featuring a large, stylized mountain range composed of overlapping, clean geometric shapes, rendered in deep indigo, teal, and burnt orange tones. The foreground contains a stylized silhouette of a fox sitting gracefully on a single, stylized pine branch. The composition is highly symmetrical and central, utilizing negative space effectively. The style is a modern graphic illustration, reminiscent of flat design mixed with geometric brutalism. The colors should have a strong, poster-print contrast and saturation, suitable for being printed on apparel. Clean lines, vector art quality, bold contrast, central focus, stylized, symmetry, minimalist illustration, deep indigo, teal, burnt orange.
negative: blur, artifact, text, logo, watermark, copyright, messy, dirty, complex, photorealism, sketch, gradient, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise
